scope: QK-CONSOLIDATE-R1 Phase 0 — post-refactor drift report. Confirms the multi-source divergences the principles audit (wf_b9e3896e-e4a) found are now single-source. Audit-only.

resolved.defect: tier promotion thresholds in 2 diverged sources (profile 5.0/2.0 vs evaluator 2.0/0.5, false 'mirrors' note)
resolved.now: SINGLE SOURCE = the profile descriptor; qk_candidate_evaluator.evaluate() loads thresholds by profile_id; DEFAULT_THRESHOLDS corrected to the documented 5.0/2.0 as the matching fallback
resolved.consequence: role-selective prefill corrected PROMOTE_TIER_A -> PROMOTE_TIER_B (+3% over global pipe is a TIER_B residual under the 5% bar); promotion unchanged

resolved.defect: refuted axes in 3 sources with 3 different disposition strings (manifest REFUTED / search_profiles do_not_search / quant known_refuted)
resolved.now: SINGLE SOURCE = qk_route_manifest.REFUTED; dump_refuted() generates the canonical list; qk_search_space_manifest_check.check_refuted_axis_drift() asserts the 3 agree on (key, disposition-class) and fails on intentional drift

resolved.defect: Q4_K quant facts in 2 sources (hardcoded QK_K/Q4K_WORDS_PER_BLOCK/Q4K_QUANT_WORD_BASE imported by the TG2 author vs the data library the library was built to be)
resolved.now: SINGLE SOURCE = quant_spec_fields('Q4_K') (the TG3 data library); TG2 author reads it (values identical 256/36/4/32, output byte-identical)

resolved.defect: policy constants baked in code: EXPLOSION_LIMIT=64 (x2), GROUPINGS dict (x2)
resolved.now: EXPLOSION_LIMIT -> topology_grammar_v1.json max_candidates (data, read by both authors); GROUPINGS -> one constant in qk_search_util

resolved.defect: ledger candidate_id reader diverged: d['candidate_id'] (KeyError) vs d.get(...) (bug #5)
resolved.now: SINGLE reader qk_search_util.ledger_candidate_ids(path); both tools call it on their own ledger files

resolved.defect: qk_artifact_cache fully built but wired to nothing (dead code; 'none wrapped yet')
resolved.now: LIVE via qk_artifact_cache.emit_artifact; 3+ artifacts now carry cache_meta; derived artifacts keyed on inputs+code so a threshold/grammar change invalidates them

resolved.defect: evaluator baseline_route_id hardcoded in the REPLAYS tuple (not in the manifest)
resolved.now: baseline_route_id lives in the manifest ROUTES; evaluate() reads it (REPLAYS tuple is the fallback); 3 routes unchanged

resolved.defect: codegen north-star (v_dot2 / cross-lane lowering) conflated with refuted; attention reopen-gate used a hand-maintained name list
resolved.now: 'deferred' status + qk_route_manifest.DEFERRED_CAPABILITIES (blocked-but-open frontier, distinct from refuted); attention refuted rows tagged domain='attention' and the reopen gate filters on the tag

resolved.defect: verdict-SSOT enforcement test deleted but still mandated by 3 docs; evaluator verdicts off-enum
resolved.now: enum-backed TierVerdict added; test/unit/test_verdict_ssot.py restored asserting BOTH Verdict and TierVerdict == their producers (PASS)

deferred_followups: burst() (2 GPU authority-harness copies) NOT extracted — below the 3-site bar + unverifiable without GPU
the two factorizers (factor_pairs vs factor_pos_lanes) NOT merged — genuinely different functions (wrong abstraction)
~10 remaining hand-rolled IO tools NOT migrated to emit_artifact — mechanical follow-on (helper exists)
attention ledger rows NOT renamed by dataflow (perf-F5) — recorded-row churn, low value; convention applies going forward
file_index: regenerated (build_repo_inventory.py + build_folder_indexes.py); 145 live files; qk_search_util + qk_artifact_cache now indexed
checks: policy consistency PASS, search-space manifest+drift check PASS, verdict SSOT test PASS after every phase; no live route default changed; no recorded disposition changed except the role-selective tier-label correction
